title: Daily Precept
description: Read one precept and write one sentence of application.

title: Sabbath Preparation
description: Plan food, study, family order, and rest before the Sabbath begins.

title: Memory Precept
description: Repeat one verse or short precept until you can explain it plainly.

title: Family Study
description: Lead a short household discussion with one Scripture and one question.

title: Logic Drill
description: Question: If someone says obedience is legalism, what false dichotomy may be present?

title: Doctrine Check
description: Test one claim by asking: What is the claim, witness, context, and conclusion?
